title: gladiolus unguiculatus
intro: Gladiolus unguiculatus, also known as the Naked Lily or Naked Gladiolus, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Iridaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat a range of health issues such as fever, coughs, and respiratory problems. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can provide various health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. Herbal preparations of Gladiolus unguiculatus can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
